_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Determine compliance with local network usage policies and procedures
reference_document_element_description: Ability to assess organizational compliance posture across multiple jurisdictions simultaneously, identifying coverage gaps, requirement conflicts, and opportunities for harmonized compliance approaches.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. Ability RC-A-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-T-002 (RC, cosine: 0.466), SP-T-006 (SP, cosine: 0.428).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.5/10 (raw 0.355). Shared vocabulary: [compliance]. NICE-only terms [determine, local, network, policies, procedures, usage] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, across, approaches, assess, conflicts, coverage] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.860 (P=0.864, R=0.856). Balanced P/R — the 9-word NICE element and 21-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.1%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Determine compliance with local network usage policies and procedures" and "Ability to assess organizational compliance posture across multiple jurisdiction". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.473 > STS 0.355 (gap +0.118). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [compliance] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.4%. Shared tokens: [compliance]. NICE-only: [determine, local, network, policies, procedures, usage]. WIDAI-only: [ability, across, approaches, assess, conflicts, coverage].

signals.detail: NLI contradiction 99.1% suggests semantic tension between the FDE and matched KSA. The competency domains may be adjacent but not functionally aligned.
